verses.latin_vulgate: Rex vero Assuerus omnem terram et cunctas maris insulas fecit tributarias :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֩שֶׂם֩ הַמֶּ֨לֶךְ (אחשרש) [אֲחַשְׁוֵר֧וֹשׁ] ׀ מַ֛ס עַל־הָאָ֖רֶץ וְאִיֵּ֥י הַיָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And king Assuerus made all the land, and all the islands of the sea tributary.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas Ahasverus laski veron maan päälle ja luotoin päälle merellä.
verses.king_james: And the king Ahasuerus laid a tribute upon the land, and upon the isles of the sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: cujus fortitudo et imperium, et dignitas atque sublimitas, qua exaltavit Mardochæum, scripta sunt in libris Medorum, atque Persarum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכׇל־מַעֲשֵׂ֤ה תׇקְפּוֹ֙ וּגְב֣וּרָת֔וֹ וּפָרָשַׁת֙ גְּדֻלַּ֣ת מׇרְדֳּכַ֔י אֲשֶׁ֥ר גִּדְּל֖וֹ הַמֶּ֑לֶךְ הֲלוֹא־הֵ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֙פֶר֙ דִּבְרֵ֣י הַיָּמִ֔ים לְמַלְכֵ֖י מָדַ֥י וּפָרָֽס׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his strength and his empire, and the dignity and greatness wherewith he exalted Mardochai, are written in the books of the Medes, and of the Persians:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kaikki hänen työnsä, voimansa ja väkevyytensä, ja Mordekain suuri kunnia, kuin kuningas hänen suureksi teki: eikö ne ole kirjoitetut Median ja Persian kuningasten aikakirjassa?
verses.king_james: And all the acts of his power and of his might, and the declaration of the greatness of Mordecai, whereunto the king advanced him, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Media and Persia?

verses.latin_vulgate: et quomodo Mardochæus judaici generis secundus a rege Assuero fuerit, et magnus apud Judæos, et acceptabilis plebi fratrum suorum, quærens bona populo suo, et loquens ea quæ ad pacem seminis sui pertinerent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י ׀ מׇרְדֳּכַ֣י הַיְּהוּדִ֗י מִשְׁנֶה֙ לַמֶּ֣לֶךְ אֲחַשְׁוֵר֔וֹשׁ וְגָדוֹל֙ לַיְּהוּדִ֔ים וְרָצ֖וּי לְרֹ֣ב אֶחָ֑יו דֹּרֵ֥שׁ טוֹב֙ לְעַמּ֔וֹ וְדֹבֵ֥ר שָׁל֖וֹם לְכׇל־זַרְעֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And how Mardochai of the race of the Jews, was next after king Assuerus: and great among the Jews, and acceptable to the people of his brethren, seeking the good of his people, and speaking those things which were for the welfare of his seed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Mordekai, Juudalainen, oli toinen kuningas Ahasveruksesta, ja väkevä Juudalaisten seassa, ja otollinen veljeinsä paljouden keskellä, joka etsi kansansa parasta ja puhui parhain päin kaiken siemenensä puolesta.
verses.king_james: For Mordecai the Jew was next unto king Ahasuerus, and great among the Jews, and accepted of the multitude of his brethren, seeking the wealth of his people, and speaking peace to all his seed.
